message:
chore: close 10 beads (T8/T9/T11 epics complete), clean up mux split_pane API

Beads closed after verifying implementation on main:
- ft-r81g8 (T9.4), ft-uwm9x (T9.2), ft-syubv (T9.3): widget GC, key_up,
  BiDi borrowing all implemented
- ft-4ohrd (T8.3): CLICK_INTERVAL now configurable
- ft-t8iuv (T9), ft-ltmyr (T8), ft-lj8uo (T11): parent epics complete
- ft-8gmtq: master audit epic (T1-T9 all done)
- ft-dwjtm: FleetScrollbackCoordinator wired into runtime
- ft-ojpy0 (T11.3): e2e tuning test exists
- ft-1qbjk: mux_pool codec bug no longer reproduces (48/48 pass)

Mux cleanup (from concurrent agent):
- Rename pane_id → source_pane_id in resolve_spawn_tab_domain/split_pane
  for clarity (removes TODO: disambiguate with TabId)
- Use actual pixel_height/pixel_width from pane dims (removes FIXME)
- Make TermWizTerminalDomain a singleton via OnceLock (removes TODO)

Validated: 21,268 core lib tests pass, 48 mux_pool tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
